items.title: Fort Wayne woman charged with bestiality takes a plea deal
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Will Le Pen rise again? French nationalist leader defiant after court's ruling
items.dek: Within hours of a court of appeal confirming a guilty verdict, Marine Le Pen had already launched her presidential campaign.
items.body: Within hours of a court of appeal confirming a guilty verdict, Marine Le Pen had already launched her presidential campaign.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nato allies announce £37bn for new missile project
items.dek: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer will convene around a dozen leaders to discuss the programme in Ankara.
items.body: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer will convene around a dozen leaders to discuss the programme in Ankara.
